m7_branch_v_limitation: ICC computed on `profile_id`; per INVARIANTS §2, within-aoestats migration/collision unevaluable (branch v). aoec namespace bridge (VERDICT A 0.9960) supports stability but doesn't audit fragmentation. ICC = upper bound on per-player variance share.
post_v1_0_4_restructure_note: v1.0.4 (PR fix/01-05-aoestats-icc-cohort-axis): sensitivity axis changed from requested-sample-size {20k,50k,100k} (which degenerated to the 744-player population) to spec §6.2 cohort match-count thresholds N ∈ {5,10,20}. Primary headline is ANOVA @ N=10 per spec v1.0.4 §14(b).
